race.comment: LETTERS PATENT (1) raced handy then battled on well to be beaten just 1.4 lengths by the highly regarded Omolong on debut last start over 1100m at Warwick Farm. Should build on that performance and take a ton of beating. STREET JEWEL (10) has been about the mark at both runs to date, the latest a closing second over 1300m at this track. Draws an awkward gate but with luck in running he should be in the finish again. COURTHEZON (3) is back after a 273-day break. Did a fair job at his only appearance to date when midfield at Eagle Farm. Recent Rosehill trial winner worth monitoring. AURORA BOOM (2) son of Farnan from Kozakov on debut. Won a trial at Warwick Farm over 821m June 26. Kepp an eye on the markets.
